Name: ACharacter
Description:
Characters are Pawns that have a mesh, collision, and built-in movement logic.
  They are responsible for all physical interaction between the player or AI and the world, and also implement basic networking and input models.
  They are designed for a vertically-oriented player representation that can walk, jump, fly, and swim through the world using CharacterMovementComponent.
 
  @see APawn, UCharacterMovementComponent

Variables.Name: Mesh
Variables.Description: The main skeletal mesh associated with this Character (optional sub-object).

Variables.Name: CharacterMovement
Variables.Description: Movement component used for movement logic in various movement modes (walking, falling, etc), containing relevant settings and functions to control movement.

Variables.Name: CapsuleComponent
Variables.Description: The CapsuleComponent being used for movement collision (by CharacterMovement). Always treated as being vertically aligned in simple collision check functions.

Variables.Name: BasedMovement
Variables.Description: Info about our current movement base (object we are standing on).

Variables.Name: ReplicatedBasedMovement
Variables.Description: Replicated version of relative movement. Read-only on simulated proxies!

Variables.Name: AnimRootMotionTranslationScale
Variables.Description: Scale to apply to root motion translation on this Character

Variables.Name: BaseTranslationOffset
Variables.Description: Saved translation offset of mesh.

Variables.Name: BaseRotationOffset
Variables.Description: Saved rotation offset of mesh.

Variables.Name: ReplicatedServerLastTransformUpdateTimeStamp
Variables.Description: CharacterMovement ServerLastTransformUpdateTimeStamp value, replicated to simulated proxies.

Variables.Name: ReplicatedMovementMode
Variables.Description: Flag that we are receiving replication of the based movement.

Variables.Name: bInBaseReplication
Variables.Description: Flag that we are receiving replication of the based movement.

Variables.Name: CrouchedEyeHeight
Variables.Description: Default crouched eye height

Variables.Name: bIsCrouched
Variables.Description: Set by character movement to specify that this Character is currently crouched.

Variables.Name: bPressedJump
Variables.Description: When true, player wants to jump

Variables.Name: bClientUpdating
Variables.Description: When true, applying updates to network client (replaying saved moves for a locally controlled character)

Variables.Name: bClientWasFalling
Variables.Description: True if Pawn was initially falling when started to replay network moves.

Variables.Name: bClientResimulateRootMotion
Variables.Description: If server disagrees with root motion track position, client has to resimulate root motion from last AckedMove.

Variables.Name: bClientResimulateRootMotionSources
Variables.Description: If server disagrees with root motion state, client has to resimulate root motion from last AckedMove.

Variables.Name: bSimGravityDisabled
Variables.Description: Disable simulated gravity (set when character encroaches geometry on client, to keep him from falling through floors)

Variables.Name: bServerMoveIgnoreRootMotion
Variables.Description: Disable root motion on the server. When receiving a DualServerMove, where the first move is not root motion and the second is.

Variables.Name: JumpKeyHoldTime
Variables.Description:
Jump key Held Time.
	  This is the time that the player has held the jump key, in seconds.

Variables.Name: JumpMaxHoldTime
Variables.Description:
The max time the jump key can be held.
	  Note that if StopJumping() is not called before the max jump hold time is reached,
	  then the character will carry on receiving vertical velocity. Therefore it is usually 
	  best to call StopJumping() when jump input has ceased (such as a button up event).

Variables.Name: JumpMaxCount
Variables.Description:
The max number of jumps the character can perform.
      Note that if JumpMaxHoldTime is non zero and StopJumping is not called, the player
      may be able to perform and unlimited number of jumps. Therefore it is usually
      best to call StopJumping() when jump input has ceased (such as a button up event).

Variables.Name: JumpCurrentCount
Variables.Description:
Tracks the current number of jumps performed.
      This is incremented in CheckJumpInput, used in CanJump_Implementation, and reset in OnMovementModeChanged.
      When providing overrides for these methods, it's recommended to either manually
      increment  reset this value, or call the Super:: method.

Variables.Name: SavedRootMotion
Variables.Description:
For LocallyControlled Autonomous clients. 
	   During a PerformMovement() after root motion is prepared, we save it off into this and
	   then record it into our SavedMoves.
	   During SavedMove playback we use it as our "Previous Move" SavedRootMotion which includes
	   last received root motion from the Server

Variables.Name: ClientRootMotionParams
Variables.Description: For LocallyControlled Autonomous clients. Saved root motion data to be used by SavedMoves.

Variables.Name: RootMotionRepMoves
Variables.Description: Array of previously received root motion moves from the server.

Variables.Name: RepRootMotion
Variables.Description: Replicated Root Motion montage

Functions.Name: CacheInitialMeshOffset
Functions.Description:
Cache mesh offset from capsule. This is used as the target for network smoothing interpolation, when the mesh is offset with lagged smoothing.
	  This is automatically called during initialization; call this at runtime if you intend to change the default mesh offset from the capsule.

Functions.Name: OnRep_ReplicatedBasedMovement
Functions.Description: Rep notify for ReplicatedBasedMovement

Functions.Name: SetReplicateMovement
Functions.Description: Set whether this actor's movement replicates to network clients.

Functions.Name: GetReplicatedMovementMode
Functions.Description: Returns ReplicatedMovementMode

Functions.Name: GetBaseTranslationOffset
Functions.Description: Get the saved translation offset of mesh. This is how much extra offset is applied from the center of the capsule.

Functions.Name: GetBaseRotationOffsetRotator
Functions.Description: Get the saved rotation offset of mesh. This is how much extra rotation is applied from the capsule rotation.

Functions.Name: OnRep_IsCrouched
Functions.Description: Handle Crouching replicated from server

Functions.Name: Jump
Functions.Description:
Make the character jump on the next update.	 
	  If you want your character to jump according to the time that the jump key is held,
	  then you can set JumpKeyHoldTime to some non-zero value. Make sure in this case to
	  call StopJumping() when you want the jump's z-velocity to stop being applied (such 
	  as on a button up event), otherwise the character will carry on receiving the 
	  velocity until JumpKeyHoldTime is reached.

Functions.Name: StopJumping
Functions.Description:
Stop the character from jumping on the next update. 
	  Call this from an input event (such as a button 'up' event) to cease applying
	  jump Z-velocity. If this is not called, then jump z-velocity will be applied
	  until JumpMaxHoldTime is reached.

Functions.Name: CanJump
Functions.Description:
Check if the character can jump in the current state.
	 
	  The default implementation may be overridden or extended by implementing the custom CanJump event in Blueprints.

Functions.Name: CanJumpInternal
Functions.Description:
Customizable event to check if the character can jump in the current state.
	  Default implementation returns true if the character is on the ground and not crouching,
	  has a valid CharacterMovementComponent and CanEverJump() returns true.
	  Default implementation also allows for 'hold to jump higher' functionality: 
	  As well as returning true when on the ground, it also returns true when GetMaxJumpTime is more
	  than zero and IsJumping returns true.

Functions.Name: IsJumpProvidingForce
Functions.Description: True if jump is actively providing a force, such as when the jump key is held and the time it has been held is less than JumpMaxHoldTime.

Functions.Name: PlayAnimMontage
Functions.Description: Play Animation Montage on the character mesh

Functions.Name: StopAnimMontage
Functions.Description: Stop Animation Montage. If NULL, it will stop what's currently active. The Blend Out Time is taken from the montage asset that is being stopped.

Functions.Name: GetCurrentMontage
Functions.Description: Return current playing Montage

Functions.Name: IsVelocitySimulated
Functions.Description: 是否正在速度场模拟中(实际生效)

Functions.Name: GetAdditiveVelocity
Functions.Description: 获取速度场的叠加速度

Functions.Name: GetSimulatedVelocity
Functions.Description: 获取速度场中的模拟速度(原有速度+叠加速度)

Functions.Name: LaunchCharacter
Functions.Description:
Set a pending launch velocity on the Character. This velocity will be processed on the next CharacterMovementComponent tick,
	   and will set it to the "falling" state. Triggers the OnLaunched event.

Functions.Name: OnLaunched
Functions.Description: Let blueprint know that we were launched

Functions.Name: OnJumped
Functions.Description: Event fired when the character has just started jumping

Functions.Name: OnLanded
Functions.Description:
Called upon landing when falling, to perform actions based on the Hit result.
	 Note that movement mode is still "Falling" during this event. Current Velocity value is the velocity at the time of landing.
	 Consider OnMovementModeChanged() as well, as that can be used once the movement mode changes to the new mode (most likely Walking).

Params.Name: Hit
Params.Description: Result describing the landing that resulted in a valid landing spot.

Functions.Name: OnWalkingOffLedge
Functions.Description:
Event fired when the Character is walking off a surface and is about to fall because CharacterMovement->CurrentFloor became unwalkable.
	  If CharacterMovement->MovementMode does not change during this event then the character will automatically start falling afterwards.

Params.Name: PreviousFloorImpactNormal
Params.Description: Normal of the previous walkable floor.

Params.Name: PreviousFloorContactNormal
Params.Description: Normal of the contact with the previous walkable floor.

Params.Name: PreviousLocation
Params.Description: Previous character location before movement off the ledge.

Functions.Name: Crouch
Functions.Description: Request the character to start crouching. The request is processed on the next update of the CharacterMovementComponent.

Functions.Name: UnCrouch
Functions.Description: Request the character to stop crouching. The request is processed on the next update of the CharacterMovementComponent.

Functions.Name: K2_OnEndCrouch
Functions.Description: Event when Character stops crouching.

Params.Name: HalfHeightAdjust
Params.Description: difference between default collision half-height, and actual crouched capsule half-height.

Params.Name: ScaledHalfHeightAdjust
Params.Description: difference after component scale is taken in to account.

Functions.Name: K2_OnStartCrouch
Functions.Description: Event when Character crouches.

Params.Name: HalfHeightAdjust
Params.Description: difference between default collision half-height, and actual crouched capsule half-height.

Params.Name: ScaledHalfHeightAdjust
Params.Description: difference after component scale is taken in to account.

Functions.Name: K2_OnMovementModeChanged
Functions.Description: Called from CharacterMovementComponent to notify the character that the movement mode has changed.

Params.Name: PrevCustomMode
Params.Description: Custom mode before the change (applicable if PrevMovementMode is Custom)

Params.Name: NewCustomMode
Params.Description: New custom mode (applicable if NewMovementMode is Custom)

Functions.Name: K2_UpdateCustomMovement
Functions.Description: Event for implementing custom character movement mode. Called by CharacterMovement if MovementMode is set to Custom.

Functions.Name: OnRep_RootMotion
Functions.Description: Handles replicated root motion properties on simulated proxies and position correction.

Functions.Name: IsPlayingRootMotion
Functions.Description: true if we are playing Root Motion right now

Functions.Name: IsPlayingNetworkedRootMotionMontage
Functions.Description:
true if we are playing Root Motion right now, through a Montage with RootMotionMode == ERootMotionMode::RootMotionFromMontagesOnly.
	  This means code path for networked root motion is enabled.

Functions.Name: GetAnimRootMotionTranslationScale
Functions.Description: Returns current value of AnimRootMotionScale

Delegate.Name: OnReachedJumpApex
Delegate.Description: Broadcast when Character's jump reaches its apex. Needs CharacterMovement->bNotifyApex = true

Delegate.Name: OnCharacterMovementUpdated
Delegate.Description:
Event triggered at the end of a CharacterMovementComponent movement update.
	  This is the preferred event to use rather than the Tick event when performing custom updates to CharacterMovement properties based on the current state.
	  This is mainly due to the nature of network updates, where client corrections in position from the server can cause multiple iterations of a movement update,
	  which allows this event to update as well, while a Tick event would not.

Params.Name: DeltaSeconds
Params.Description: Delta time in seconds for this update
